name: Dining Philosophers
generated_spec:
---- MODULE DiningPhilosophers ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

VARIABLES forks, states

(* Constants *)
N == 5

(* Helper functions *)
Left(i) == (i + N - 1) \mod N
Right(i) == (i + 1) \mod N

(* State predicates *)
ForksOwned == forks \in [0 .. N-1 -> 0 .. N-1]
StatesValid == states \in [0 .. N-1 -> {"thinking", "hungry", "eating"}]

(* Initial state *)
Init == /\ ForksOwned
        /\ StatesValid
        /\ \A i \in 0 .. N-1: states[i] = "thinking"

(* Next-state relation *)
Next == \/ \A i \in 0 .. N-1:
          /\ states[i] = "thinking"
          /\ states[Left(i)] = "hungry"
          /\ states[Right(i)] = "hungry"
          /\ forks[i] = i
          /\ forks[Left(i)] = Left(i)
          /\ forks[Right(i)] = Right(i)
          /\ states' = [states EXCEPT ![i] = "eating"]
          /\ forks' = [forks EXCEPT ![i] = i, ![Left(i)] = i, ![Right(i)] = i]
        \/ \A i \in 0 .. N-1:
          /\ states[i] = "hungry"
          /\ forks[i] = i
          /\ forks[Left(i)] = i
          /\ forks[Right(i)] = Right(i)
          /\ states' = [states EXCEPT ![i] = "eating"]
          /\ forks' = [forks EXCEPT ![i] = i, ![Left(i)] = i, ![Right(i)] = Right(i)]
        \/ \A i \in 0 .. N-1:
          /\ states[i] = "hungry"
          /\ forks[i] = i
          /\ forks[Left(i)] = Left(i)
          /\ forks[Right(i)] = i
          /\ states' = [states EXCEPT ![i] = "eating"]
          /\ forks' = [forks EXCEPT ![i] = i, ![Left(i)] = Left(i), ![Right(i)] = i]
        \/ \A i \in 0 .. N-1:
          /\ states[i] = "hungry"
          /\ forks[i] = i
          /\ forks[Left(i)] = Left(i)
          /\ forks[Right(i)] = Right(i)
          /\ states' = [states EXCEPT ![i] = "thinking"]
          /\ forks' = [forks EXCEPT ![i] = i, ![Left(i)] = Left(i), ![Right(i)] = Right(i)]
        \/ \A i \in 0 .. N-1:
          /\ states[i] = "eating"
          /\ forks[i] = i
          /\ forks[Left(i)] = i
          /\ forks[Right(i)] = i
          /\ states' = [states EXCEPT ![i] = "thinking"]
          /\ forks' = [forks EXCEPT ![i] = i, ![Left(i)] = Left(i), ![Right(i)] = Right(i)]

(* Specification *)
Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<forks, states>>

(* Type invariant *)
TypeOK == /\ ForksOwned
          /\ StatesValid

name: Producer-Consumer Queue
generated_spec:
---- MODULE BoundedFIFOQueue ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANT K

VARIABLES q, head, tail, size

Init == /\ q = <<>>
        /\ head = 1
        /\ tail = 1
        /\ size = 0

Next == 
  \/ /\ size < K
     /\ head' = head
        /\ tail' = (tail % K) + 1
        /\ size' = size + 1
        /\ q' = Append(q, head)
  \/ /\ size > 0
     /\ head' = (head % K) + 1
        /\ tail' = tail
        /\ size' = size - 1
        /\ q' = Tail(q)

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<q, head, tail, size>>
